{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent has significantly improved the conceptual framing of the text, identifying key concepts and reorganizing the structure to better convey the problem-gap-contribution arc.",
    "R1.4": "The agent has clearly articulated the novelty of the work, contrasting it with existing studies and highlighting its unique contributions.",
    "RX.1": "While the agent has flagged some uncertainty in their assumptions (e.g., direction of deployment gap), they could have been more explicit about the limitations of their changes.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's output is entirely within the scope of the original text, addressing the specific issues and contributions mentioned.",
    "RX.4": "The agent has avoided introducing any new errors or harmful content, and has actually improved the clarity and coherence of the text.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change made by the agent is annotated with a clear rationale and justification."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.97
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent has significantly improved the conceptual framing of the text, identifying key concepts and reorganizing the structure to better convey the problem-gap-contribution arc.
rationale.R1.4: The agent has clearly articulated the novelty of the work, contrasting it with existing studies and highlighting its unique contributions.
rationale.RX.1: While the agent has flagged some uncertainty in their assumptions (e.g., direction of deployment gap), they could have been more explicit about the limitations of their changes.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's output is entirely within the scope of the original text, addressing the specific issues and contributions mentioned.
rationale.RX.4: The agent has avoided introducing any new errors or harmful content, and has actually improved the clarity and coherence of the text.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change made by the agent is annotated with a clear rationale and justification.
